name: Shenzhen WOTE Advanced Materials Co., Ltd
summary: Shenzhen WOTE Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, sells, trades in, and services polymer materials and engineering plastic products in China and internationally. The company offers PES, PEEK, and LCP high temperature materials; aramid products; carbon-fiber reinforced materials; wear resistant lubricated materials; carbon black powder reinforced electronic conductive products; high gloss spray-free materials; nano-composite materials; and modified PPO, PC, and PC/ABS series materials. Shenzhen WOTE Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
